title: 4th of July Plans | #shorts
full_text: Oh my god, this is so nice to see you guys having so much fun. Aren't you glad we didn't go anywhere? You know that other people so dumb Fourth of July going adventure park and and thrilling and buning and isn't this so much more fun? Like would you rather not be doing this? Isn't this the best Fourth of July you ever had? Yeah, I guess so.
